name: extensive-justification
description: Enhanced structured justification with two step types. VulnerabilityFinding is now UndesiredOperation (what goes wrong: description, code, CWEs, impact, required variable state) + Justification (proof of reachability: initial_state at function entry, then a trace of DataTransformation steps (in_state -> out_state) and ConditionalStep steps (prove specific branch is taken with current state). The prompt requires a complete trace from function entry to undesired operation, covering both control flow and data flow.
